mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO aro_personnel( user_id, name, job_number, id_number, head, gender, mobile_phone, email, department_name, project_group_name, user_type_names, user_class_name, is_school, state, join_room_name, allowed_rooms_json, total_exp, update_time ) VALUES
( #{p.id}, #{p.name}, #{p.jobNumber}, #{p.idNumber}, #{p.head}, #{p.gender}, #{p.mobilePhone}, #{p.email}, #{p.departmentName}, #{p.resolvedProjectGroupNames}, #{p.userTypeNames}, #{p.userClassName}, #{p.isSchool}, #{p.state}, #{p.joinRoomName}, #{p.allowedRoomsJson}, COALESCE(#{p.totalExp}, 0), #{currentTime} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), job_number = VALUES(job_number), id_number = VALUES(id_number), head = VALUES(head), gender = VALUES(gender), mobile_phone = VALUES(mobile_phone), email = VALUES(email), department_name = VALUES(department_name), project_group_name = VALUES(project_group_name), user_type_names = VALUES(user_type_names), user_class_name = VALUES(user_class_name), is_school = VALUES(is_school), state = VALUES(state), join_room_name = VALUES(join_room_name), allowed_rooms_json = COALESCE(VALUES(allowed_rooms_json), aro_personnel.allowed_rooms_json), update_time = VALUES(update_time)
